segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval classroom with gothic vaulted ceilings and stone architecture. Students sit at wooden desks on either side of a central blue carpet, writing or studying, while natural light streams through tall windows at the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval classroom defined by its gothic architecture and scholarly atmosphere. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the hall, where vaulted stone ceilings loom over rows of wooden desks. As the eye travels deeper into the space, the focus settles on students diligently writing and studying on either side of a central blue carpet. The scene finally culminates in the distance, where soft natural light streams through tall windows to illuminate the far end of the stone hall.
